scripts.build: yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-common run build && yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-menu run build && yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-menu-button run build && yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-menubar run build && yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-toolbar run build && yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-splitter run build && yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-dialog run build && yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-textarea run build && yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-virtual-canvas run build && yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-listbox run build && yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-select run build && yarn workspace @rcarls/rc-combobox run build
